meta.title: Consequential Actions — minimal
meta.author: dknauss
meta.description: A single gated action: try changing your own password and watch it demand a fresh password confirmation before the change commits.

Demo: scroll to New Password, set a new password, and click Update Profile. Consequential Actions will require you to confirm your current password before the change is saved. Default admin password here is password.
